pages.text: $(o)"To heal, first heal yourself; then the many; then the land."$()$(br2)Three lines of the old Healer's Creed — and the three layers of this scroll.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)32 blocks$():$(br)· $(l)Players$() heal $(l)20 HP$() + Regen III (10s)$(br)· $(l)Crops$() force-tick 5x (~5 bonemeal)$(br)· Current chunk mana $(l)+500$()$(br2)Cost: $(l)7500$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Team heal + farm boost + leyline refill — three uses, one cast.$(br2)Costly but excellent at large-base scale.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 4 Dominion$() or above.
